LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_Frame.descriptio: 一种强化外骨骼框架，旨在支撑先进动力装甲的重量和系统。动力装甲框架本身提供基本的保护并增加了承载能力，但当配备完整的装甲板时，它才真正闪耀。对于任何希望在荒地操作战前动力装甲服的人来说都是必不可少的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_Frame.label: 动力装甲框架
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45Armor.descrip: The T-45 was the first power armor model deployed in the field, offering s老旧iers unprecedented protection and strength. Though now considered outdated, its heavy plating and servo-assisted joints still provide formidable defense and enhanced mobility to any wastelander lucky enough to find a working suit.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45Armor.label: T-45动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51Armor.descrip: T-51 是一款传奇的战前动力装甲，以其卓越的防护能力和先进的设计而闻名。其钛复合材料外壳和改进的伺服系统使其比早期型号更轻、更耐用，赋予佩戴者在战场上无与伦比的弹性和力量。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51Armor.label: T-51动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60Armor.descrip: The T-60 represents the pinnacle of pre-war military engineering, combining the best features of earlier models with enhanced armor and reliability. Favored by the 钢铁兄弟会, the T-60 offers exceptional protection, advanced environmental sealing, and a menacing presence on any battlefield.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60Armor.label: T-60动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor.descr: T-51 动力装甲的涂装方案灵感源自标志性的 Abraxo Cleaner 品牌。干净、清爽、明确无误——这种公司油漆工作将战前的广告美学带入了荒原。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor.label: T-51 动力涂料 Abraxo 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-51 动力装甲上饰有令人眼花缭乱的火焰贴花，可让敌人回头率直，心中充满恐惧。这种标志性的热棒设计将荒地风格带入了战场。
T-51 Hotrodder 火焰作业动力装甲
T-51 power armor in b老旧, vibrant hot pink that makes a statement. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked on the battlefield.
T-51 Hotrodder 粉红色动力装甲
T-51 动力装甲，带有凶猛的鲨鱼牙齿，采用战前战斗机的风格绘制。这种激进的涂装方案向你的敌人表明你是认真的。
T-51 Hotrodder 鲨鱼涂装动力装甲
T-51 动力装甲，带有彩色 Sugar Bombs 谷物品牌。这种有趣的涂装方案既甜蜜又爆炸，将怀旧与恐吓融为一体。
T-51动力涂料糖弹动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-60 动力装甲上印有令人眼花缭乱的火焰贴花，可让敌人回头率直，心中充满恐惧。这种标志性的热棒设计将荒地风格带入了战场。
T-60 Hotrodder 火焰作业动力装甲
T-60 power armor in b老旧, vibrant hot pink that makes a statement. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked on the battlefield.
T-60 Hotrodder 粉色动力装甲
T-60 动力装甲，带有凶猛的鲨鱼牙齿，采用战前战斗机的风格绘制。这种激进的涂装方案向你的敌人表明你是认真的。
T-60 Hotrodder 鲨鱼涂装动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_X01_Power_Armor.description: The X-01 is the most advanced power armor ever developed before the Great War, shrouded in secrecy and rarely seen outside top-秘密 military installations. Its cutting-edge materials and systems provide unmatched protection, strength, and intimidation, making it the ultimate prize for any wasteland survivor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_X01_Power_Armor.label: X-01动力装甲
